Southeastern Spain · Since 1988

What is ENAE.

The leading business school in southeastern Spain, founded under the University of Murcia Foundation — a non-profit institution bridging academia and private enterprise since 1988.

Over three decades training leaders for the global market, supported by 200+ partner companies and two public universities.

Five reasons that make ENAE, ENAE
70% of faculty are active business professionals
AI & digital transformation at the core of every programme
Project-based, hands-on learning methodology
90%+ career improvement within 12 months of graduation
Students from 50+ countries every academic year

Where is
Murcia?

A Place to Live

Living in Murcia
SOUTHEASTERN SPAIN
37.99° N · 1.13° W

Three hundred days of Mediterranean sun. A baroque city centre at coffee distance from a high-speed station. A campus built for students.

300
days of sun per year
20°C
average annual temperature
3.5h
from Madrid by high-speed train

The Experience

Beaches twenty minutes from the lecture hall. Tapas at midnight in the Plaza de las Flores. A vibrant university city of 460,000 — affordable, walkable, and rooted in the slow Mediterranean rhythm that makes a year of study feel like a chapter of life.

Practical Info

Currency
Euro (€)
Business hours
9–13:30 · 16:30–20
Electricity
220 V · Type F
Cost of living
€700 – €1,000 / month
Campus
2,200 m² · Universitario de Espinardo

Region of Murcia

Where the Sun Never Hides

Live it. Feel its energy. Discover Murcia.

CHAPTER · 02
THE REGION
Three Worlds · One Region
01 · The Sea
250 km

Costa Cálida

Unique beaches, unspoiled coves, diving in Cabo de Palos, sailing, and exquisite coastal cuisine.

02 · The Peaks
6 natural parks

Inland Adventure

Scenic trails, viewpoints, outdoor adventures, and charming villages like Moratalla and Caravaca.

03 · The Soul
2,000 years

Living Heritage

Roman Cartagena, baroque Murcia, wine country, gastronomy, and traditional festivals woven into daily life.

Nine Programs · Taught in English

Ranked Top-10 QS · Top-6 Forbes
Master's Programs in English.
International MBA
General Management · Leadership
Comprehensive programme for professionals ready to lead global organisations across strategy, finance and innovation.
Global Executive MBA
Executive Strategy · Global Leadership
Designed for executives to manage global businesses and drive economic wealth while enabling inclusive development and social progress.
Master in International Trade
Trade · Export · Global Markets
Ranked Top 3 QS worldwide and #2 El Mundo. Lead international trade operations and global negotiations.
Master in Global Supply Chain
Logistics · Operations · Procurement
Equips students with the tools for successful project management, production oversight, logistics coordination, and purchasing strategy.
Master in Agribusiness
Agri-food · Sustainability
Ranked #4 El Mundo. Lead global agri-food companies combining business strategy, sustainability, and technology.
Master in AI for Business
AI · Data Science · Deep Learning
Acquire practical skills in applying Python, Deep Learning, Open AI, and Machine Learning to drive decision making.
Master in Business Intelligence & Analytics
Big Data · Business Analytics
Master predictive analytics, data warehouse, and data visualization tools to solve major challenges using AI algorithms.
Master in Human Resources & People Analytics
People Analytics · HR Strategy
Align human capital with corporate strategy, mastering talent development, organizational culture, and people metrics.
Master in Risk Management
Risk · Compliance · Governance
Comprehensive risk frameworks integrating financial, operational and strategic risk globally.
Undergraduate Program
Bachelor in Business Administration

Immerse yourself in a learning journey that exposes you to the latest global business practices, theories, and trends. Develop a unique competitive edge to lead organizations from an innovation and strategy perspective.

Degree Level
Official US Bachelor's
Duration & Credits
32 Months / 120 US Credits
Next Intake
Fall 2026
Academic Program Structure
General Education Courses
Critical Thinking, Economics, Algebra, English Composition, History of Modern Western Civilization.
Basic Education Courses
Management Accounting, Financial Management, Marketing Principles, Operations, and Supply Chain.
Specialization Courses
Digital Transformation, Innovation Management, Big Data & Analytics, AI & Machine Learning.

70% Active Professionals · Zero Ivory Tower

Learning that Drives Real Change
Real-world cases
Learn from actual business challenges with active executives and company directors
AI & digital tools
Artificial Intelligence, Business Analytics, SAP, Power BI, n8n and automation platforms
Collaborative projects
Teamwork with peers from 50+ countries — a truly multicultural learning experience
Career services
Mentoring, CV coaching, talent recruitment days and alumni network access
Networking
Corporate visits, international conferences, alumni events and professional forums
